title: Power damage fix
description: Fixes Power damage being lower than intended in 1.21-1.21.3 (MC-277617)
body:
Mojang accidentally lowered the Power enchantment damage increase in 1.21 ([MC-277617](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-277617)). The bug has been officially fixed in 1.21.4, but previous versions still have the bug. This mod fixes the bug for versions 1.21-1.21.3.

You don't need this mod if you're using my combat overhaul mod, [ReArm](https://modrinth.com/mod/rearm), as it includes this fix already.
